spec.assertion: buffApply atkPct≈23.61 covers 4 distinct targetIdx on FB enter; fails self-scoped nearest-wrong (size→1)
application rounds == fullBurstStart count (fires on every team FB); fails a burstCast keying if Privaty skips any FB (⚑ weak: no other B3 bursts here)
buffApply reloadSpeedPct≈51.16 on 4 allies; fails if scoped/omitted
buffApply maxAmmoPct value NEGATIVE (~-50.66) on 4 allies; fails a positive-buff sign error (weapon-state = damage: shrinks magazines, raises last-bullet frequency)
buffApply attackDamagePct≈20.16 (Damage-Up bucket) on 4 allies; fails if put in wrong bucket/omitted
buffApply damageTakenPct≈10.01 with casterIdx===null && targetIdx===null (boss debuff); fails if modeled as a self/ally buff
damage events at mult≈2.5617 exist; RED (0) when the rider atkPct is zeroed
mult≈16.87 hits present with burst-applied status; RED (0) when burst's targetStatus is killed; 256.17% rider unaffected (gate isolation + non-vacuity both/neither)
buffApply elemAdvantageDamagePct≈130 on exactly 1 target (self); fails allies-scoped nearest-wrong (size→4). Live only under elemental advantage (Water vs Fire boss)
damage mult≈14.0764 with fbMajorApplied===false (burst-cast instant is FB-exempt); fails a noFb-off model that stacks the +50% major
it.skip — boss takes no actions in v1, stun unobservable
it.skip — boss ATK never feeds our damage (immortal boss); status-application itself is exercised via the skill2 +1687% gate test

fixtures: controlComp('privaty', true) for every assertion — liter B1 / crown B2 / privaty B3 (carry+focus) / helm B3 give a real FB chain (a lone B3 casts zero Full Bursts, which would make skill1's fullBurstEnter trigger and the burst-applied Designated Target status both vacuous). helm=true kept: its buffs are on different stats/values than Privaty's distinctive magnitudes (23.61 / 51.16 / -50.66 / 20.16 / 10.01 / 130), so value-filtering isolates Privaty cleanly. Boss element Fire is load-bearing: Privaty (Water) holds elemental advantage so the burst's elemAdvantageDamagePct block is active. Counterfactuals via withPatchedOverride use content-addressed mutators (search by stat/value/kind), so they are robust to the driver's unknown block indexing.
gaps: burst Stun 3s — it.skip: v1 boss never fires/charges/reloads, a stun has no observable effect

burst Designated Target ATK ▼5.02% — it.skip: boss ATK does not feed our damage (immortal boss deals none); the targetStatus application is verified indirectly by the skill2 +1687% gate test (killing it zeroes the big rider)

⚑ last-bullet CADENCE (not a skip, a flag): the trigger IDENTITY (per-magazine lastBullet) is asserted structurally, but the wall-clock frequency of 256.17%/1687% riders rides the datamine-unreliable fire rate + the maxAmmo▼ magazine — magnitudes are tested, absolute per-fight counts are not pinned

burstCast-vs-fullBurstEnter discriminator for skill1 is WEAK in this fixture: helm is the only other B3 and does not out-burst Privaty, so both models yield rounds==FB count. A second bursting B3 comp would be needed to fully separate them (documented, not blocking)
